data.title: UK’s Largest Bitcoin Treasury Smarter Web Eyes ‘Struggling’ Competitor Acquisitions for Discount Prices
data.description:
Smarter Web Company, the UK's largest corporate Bitcoin holder with over £200 million in crypto reserves, is exploring acquisitions of distressed competitors to acquire their Bitcoin holdings at discount prices despite its shares plummeting 73% from their mid-June peak, as founder Andrew Webley revealed the firm would "certainly consider" snapping up other companies trading below the value of their Bitcoin holdings.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/uks-largest-bitcoin-treasury-smarter-web-eyes-struggling-competitor-acquisitions-for-discount-prices/

data.title: TON Strategy Company launches its previously planned first share buyback and begins staking TON assets
data.description: TON Strategy Company (Nasdaq: TONX) announced that it has repurchased over 250,000 shares of its common stock under its previously announced $250 million share repurchase program. Furthermore, the company has commenced staking of TON assets as planned, aiming to leverage assets held in its treasury to generate on-chain returns. The average price of the repurchased shares was $8.32 per share; by comparison, the company's book asset value (TAV) per share was $12.181 as of September 11, 2025. (Businesswire)

data.title: WisdomTree launches its first tokenized fund, providing investors with exposure to private credit investments
data.description: WisdomTree Inc. has launched its first tokenized fund, offering investors exposure to private credit investments. The WisdomTree Private Credit and Alternative Income Digital Fund (CRDT), which officially launched on Friday, tracks an equally weighted index of 35 closed-end funds, business development companies, and real estate investment trusts. The company already launched an ETF based on the benchmark in 2021. The tokenized fund has a minimum investment of $25 and allows redemptions within two days. CRDT tracks an index of public investment vehicles tied to private credit, a design that lowers barriers to entry and increases liquidity, but still puts a layer between investors and the underlying loans. WisdomTree's CRDT fund will be tokenized on the Ethereum and Stellar blockchains at launch, with plans to expand to other blockchains, such as Avalanche, in the coming weeks. (Bloomberg)

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Sees Gains in Crypto Treasury Companies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. stock market opened with gains for several crypto treasury companies. Forward Industries Inc (FORD) saw a significant increase, opening up 15.23% and currently trading at $39.73. Sol Strategies Inc (STKE) experienced a rise of 3.72%, with its current price at $7.04. MicroStrategy Incorporated (MSTR), a Bitcoin treasury company, opened with a 1.02% increase. Meanwhile, Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc (BMNR), an Ethereum treasury company, saw its stock rise by 1.91%.

data.title: Solana Staking ETF Achieves Record Asset Management Milestone
data.description: According to PANews, the first Solana staking ETF in the United States, launched by REX Shares and trading under the ticker $SSK, has reached a record asset management size of $251 million. This achievement marks a significant milestone for the ETF, reflecting growing investor interest in Solana's staking opportunities.

data.title: glassnode: BTC has dense support in the range of $110,000 to $114,000, and the next resistance level is $117,000
data.description: According to glassnode data, Bitcoin's cost-basis distribution shows dense support in the $110,000 to $114,000 range, where a significant amount of supply has been captured. The next major supply area is located around $117,000, which may provide resistance.

data.title: Locate Technologies to Debut on New Zealand Stock Exchange
data.description: According to PANews, Locate Technologies, an Australian Bitcoin treasury company, is set to become the first of its kind to be listed on the New Zealand Stock Exchange (NZX). This development marks a significant milestone for the company, which trades under the stock symbol $LOC. The listing is expected to enhance the company's visibility and accessibility in the financial markets.

data.title: Trump: Suspect in Charlie Kirk assassination is in custody
data.description: In an interview, Trump said the suspect in the assassination of Charlie Kirk is in custody and he hopes he will be sentenced to death.

data.title: A whale deposited 25,754 ETH to Binance after nine months, possibly liquidating its holdings.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the address 0xdE 0...fDc41 deposited 25,754 ETH to Binance after nine months, worth $117 million. If sold, the address has already completely exited the market. This address frequently interacts with block builders Beaver Builder and Titan Builder, having transferred a total of 45,132 ETH to CEXs over the past two years.

data.title: 105 of 107 Economists Expect Fed to Cut Rates 25 Basis Points on September 17: Reuters
data.description:
Nearly unanimous consensus among economists points to a Fed rate cut next week, with 105 of 107 economists expecting a 25 basis-point reduction on September 17, marking the first easing since January, as Bitcoin surged above $116,000 following fresh inflation data with the Producer Price Index declining 0. 1% unexpectedly, while spot Bitcoin ETFs drew $553 million in net inflows.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/105-of-107-economists-expect-fed-to-cut-rates-25-basis-points-on-september-17-reuters/

data.title: TON Strategy Company Executes Stock Buyback and Asset Staking Plan
data.description: According to PANews, TON Strategy Company, listed on Nasdaq as TONX, has announced the repurchase of over 250,000 shares of common stock under its previously disclosed $250 million stock buyback program. The company has also initiated the staking of TON assets, aiming to leverage its treasury holdings for on-chain revenue generation. The average price for the repurchased shares was $8.32 each, while the company's tangible asset value per share stood at $12.181 as of September 11, 2025.
